overview: Dynamic and interactive web design showcasing various animated components, often featuring dark themes with vibrant accents and sophisticated visual effects like 3D models, shaders, and animated gradients.

layout.structure: The video demonstrates individual components rather than a full site structure. Each component is presented as a centered section on a distinct background. Common pattern is a component title, short description, and interactive element (e.g., 'Copy Component' button).
layout.grid: Not explicitly shown, but components are centrally aligned, implying a single column layout or a grid with centered content areas.
layout.spacing: Generous vertical padding (e.g., 80px-120px) around components. Consistent internal component spacing (e.g., 24px-48px between text blocks and interactive elements).

animations.type: Vertical lines with pulsating glow and subtle particle movement
Horizontal gradient bands with a subtle wave/pulsing motion
3D rotation of album cover elements in a circular path
Background effect with ethereal glow, light refraction, and subtle wave motion

interactions.effect: Background color change, subtle scale or shadow effect

background_effects: Includes full-screen animated shaders, dynamic light-refracting wave effects, pulsating multi-color gradients, and solid vibrant color backgrounds.
recreation_notes: Recreating these designs heavily relies on modern browser capabilities for 3D rendering (WebGL/Three.js), CSS custom properties, and advanced CSS animations/transitions. Framer's component system likely abstracts much of this complexity. Pay close attention to performance for continuous animations. Typography mixes elegant serifs for display with clean sans-serifs for readability. Precise timing and easing curves are crucial for smooth, high-quality animations.
